title: CVE-2025-41257: BioStar 2 Vulnerability
summary: Suprema's BioStar 2 in version 2.9.11.6 allows users to set new passwords without providing the current one, allowing attackers to gain unauthorized access. A patch is available, but exploitation in the wild has been reported.

title: CVE-2026-29086: Hono Web Application Framework Vulnerability
summary: Prior to version 4.12.4, Hono's setCookie utility did not validate cookie values, allowing attackers to inject malicious data. A patch is available, but exploitation in the wild has been reported.

title: CVE-2026-29045: Hono Web Application Framework Vulnerability
summary: Prior to version 4.12.4, Hono's serveStatic feature is vulnerable to a bug that allows attackers to access sensitive information. A patch is available, but exploitation in the wild has been reported.

title: CVE-2026-26002: Open OnDemand Files Application Vulnerability
summary: The Files application in Open OnDemand versions prior to 4.0.9 and 4.1.3 is susceptible to a vulnerability that allows attackers to access sensitive information. A patch is available, but exploitation in the wild has been reported.

title: CVE-2026-2297: CPython Legacy File Loader Vulnerability
summary: The import hook in CPython that handles legacy *.pyc files is incorrectly handled, allowing attackers to access sensitive information. A patch is available, but exploitation in the wild has been reported.
